814-486-9322 Registrar/Voter Registration Misty K. Lupro mlupro@cameroncopa.gov 814-486-9321 Board o f Elections: Jessica Herzing James Moate Josh Zucal General Primary Election : May 19, 2026. Mail In Ballots will start to go out on April 21, 2026. We will start to accept in person requests starting April 21, 2026. Hours of operation are Monday through Friday, to . Voters can drop off their mail in ballots or use our Drop Box. For Drop Box Use: The Drop Box is available for anyone wishing to drop off payments, correspondence, Absentee/Mailin Ballots, etc. It is located on Chestnut Street or East side of the building at the base of the handicap ramp. This box is checked daily by the Chief Clerk and Assistant Clerk. Powered by revize. Login × Share this page Copy and paste this code into your website.
